import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[products,setProducts]=useState([]);const[orders,setOrders]=useState([]);const[name,setName]=useState("");const[price,setPrice]=useState("");const[stock,setStock]=useState("");// Use environment variables or fallback to NodePorts
const PRODUCT_API=process.env.REACT_APP_PRODUCT_API||"http://localhost:30001";const ORDER_API=process.env.REACT_APP_ORDER_API||"http://localhost:30002";const loadProducts=async()=>{const res=await axios.get(`${PRODUCT_API}/products`);setProducts(res.data);};const loadOrders=async()=>{const res=await axios.get(`${ORDER_API}/orders`);setOrders(res.data);};useEffect(()=>{loadProducts();loadOrders();},[]);const addProduct=async()=>{await axios.post(`${PRODUCT_API}/products`,{name,price,stock});loadProducts();};const createOrder=async id=>{await axios.post(`${ORDER_API}/orders`,{product_id:id,quantity:1});loadOrders();};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{padding:40},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Ecommerce Platform"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Add Product"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"name",onChange:e=>setName(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"price",onChange:e=>setPrice(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"stock",onChange:e=>setStock(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:addProduct,children:"Add"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Products"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:products.map(p=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:[p.name," \u20B9",p.price," stock:",p.stock,/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>createOrder(p.id),children:"Order"})]},p.id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Orders"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:orders.map(o=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:["Order #",o.id," product:",o.product_id]},o.id))})]});}export default App;
